select
M._id
,MA.`member.MemberAttributeValues.MemberAttributeValue.Attribute` Attribute
, MA.`member.MemberAttributeValues.MemberAttributeValue.AttributeCode` AttributeCode
,coalesce(MA.`member.MemberAttributeValues.MemberAttributeValue.CustomValue`,MA.`member.MemberAttributeValues.MemberAttributeValue.DefinedValue`) Value
,MA.`member.MemberAttributeValues.MemberAttributeValue.CustomValue` CustomValue
,MA.`member.MemberAttributeValues.MemberAttributeValue.DefinedValue` DefinedValue
,MA.`member.MemberAttributeValues.MemberAttributeValue.StartDate` StartDate
, MA.`member.MemberAttributeValues.MemberAttributeValue.EndDate` EndDate
, MA.`member.MemberAttributeValues.MemberAttributeValue.IsChanged` IsChanged
, MA.`member.MemberAttributeValues.MemberAttributeValue.LastUpdatedUser` LastUpdatedUser
, MA.`member.MemberAttributeValues.MemberAttributeValue.Source` Source
, MA.`member.MemberAttributeValues.MemberAttributeValue.Void` Void
from umv.Members M
join umv.Members_member_MemberAttributeValues_MemberAttributeValue MA on MA._id = M._id

where 1=1
 and
'2010-09-18T00:00:00' between MA.`member.MemberAttributeValues.MemberAttributeValue.StartDate` and MA.`member.MemberAttributeValues.MemberAttributeValue.EndDate`
and MA.`member.MemberAttributeValues.MemberAttributeValue.Void` = 0;
